LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction01.label: Corporation
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction01.description: A structure built on profit and production. Power belongs to capital, and decisions are made by those who control the resources.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction02.label: Cartel
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction02.description: A union controlling profitable industries and markets. They operate covertly, balancing between the law and the shadows.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction03.label: Alliance
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction03.description: A union of several forces for a common goal. Often unstable, but powerful as long as the interests of the participants align.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction04.label: Union
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction04.description: A grouping of enterprises or settlements linked by economics or defense. They are brought together by common survival.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction05.label: Plant
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction05.description: A disciplined system of production where a person is part of the mechanism. A symbol of industrial efficiency and hard labor.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction06.label: Factory
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction06.description: A place of continuous flow of goods, noise, and steam. Workers live in the shadow of machines, fueling progress with their sweat.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction07.label: Labor Union
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction07.description: A community of workers defending their rights. Sometimes peaceful, sometimes ready for rebellion for the sake of justice.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction08.label: Association
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction08.description: A flexible network of specialists and masters. Their strength lies in cooperation and the freedom of knowledge exchange.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction09.label: Complex
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction09.description: A closed structure combining plants, laboratories, and settlements. It often lives by its own laws and regulations.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction10.label: Organization
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction10.description: A strictly structured power with hierarchy and order. A struggle of interests and hidden ambitions seethes within.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction11.label: City
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction11.description: The heart of industrial civilization. Towers, smoke, and neon create the pulse of a living metropolis.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction12.label: Front
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction12.description: A military or ideological union. It fights not only with weapons, but with words, influence, and faith.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction13.label: Global Union
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction13.description: A treaty between nations or corporations. Behind the outward sense of unity, competition always lurks.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction14.label: League
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction14.description: An old alliance with traditions and a charter. It often turns into an elite gathering where the fates of others are decided.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction15.label: Fleet
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction15.description: An organized force dominating water or air. A symbol of mobility and military power in the age of machines.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction16.label: Collective
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction16.description: A community where equality is more important than status. Their ideals often clash with the harsh reality of industry.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction17.label: Nation
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction17.description: A people united by a common culture and goal. Their pride drives progress forward, but easily turns into fanaticism.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction18.label: Coalition
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction18.description: A temporary alliance of forces against a greater threat. After victory, it often collapses under the weight of disagreements.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction19.label: Society
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction19.description: A union of people with common beliefs or a common goal. Defines the spirit of the era — progressive or dogmatic.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction20.label: Company
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction20.description: A group driven by profit and ambition. From small traders to huge corporations — there is always an adventure at their heart.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction21.label: Trade Union
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction21.description: A network of dealers and middlemen who have turned dangerous lands into a profitable business. They know the price of every bullet and are ready to buy up any finds if there is demand "outside the perimeter."
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction22.label: Expeditionary Corps
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction22.description: A private organization. They are interested not in ideologies, but in technology and raw materials. They consider themselves civilized players in a wild land, but their methods are rarely clean.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction23.label: Syndicate
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction23.description: A criminal or business union that tightly controls shadow markets. Their influence extends further than laws reach.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction24.label: Consortium
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction24.description: A temporary pooling of capital for the implementation of mega-projects. They are driven by calculation and a long-term strategy of dominance.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction25.label: Trust
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction25.description: A monopoly that has crushed an entire industry. Within this structure, there is no competition, only iron subordination.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction26.label: Artel
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction26.description: A voluntary association of craftsmen sharing income fairly. An island of old orders in an ocean of corporate capitalism.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction27.label: Department
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction27.description: A remnant of the old state machine, functioning by inertia. Bureaucracy is elevated to a cult here, and instructions are more important than common sense.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction28.label: Guild
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction28.description: A closed community of specialists jealously guarding production secrets. To get here, you have to go through years of rigorous apprenticeship.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction29.label: Combine
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction29.description: A giant production chain turning raw materials into finished products. The heart of an industrial district that never knows silence.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction30.label: Holding
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction30.description: An invisible hand owning dozens of small companies. They do not produce goods; they manage the fates of those who create them.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction31.label: Garrison
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction31.description: A settlement that grew around a military facility. Discipline and readiness for defense have soaked into every brick and every soul here.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction32.label: Sector
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction32.description: A territorial union living under a single administrative management. Dry pragmatism and accounting for every gram of resources.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction33.label: Block
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction33.description: A political and military alliance of several cities. Their strength is in unity against external threats, though internal friction is inevitable.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction34.label: Council
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction34.description: A local self-government body that has taken on the role of supreme authority. They try to maintain order in a world where old laws no longer apply.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction35.label: Raid
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction35.description: A mobile group of prospectors and mercenaries living off reconnaissance and resource extraction in dangerous zones.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction36.label: Manufactory
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction36.description: A place where traditions of manual labor meet the power of machine tools. Every product bears the mark of the master and the heat of the furnace.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction37.label: Directorate
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction37.description: A board of managers for whom people are just lines in reports. Their decisions are cold, and their goals are always measured in profit figures.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction38.label: Fund
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction38.description: An organization investing in the future. They can fund science or wars if they see long-term benefit in it.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction39.label: Arena
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction39.description: A community built around competitions and spectacles. Here, authority is won by force, and every day is a struggle for the right to be first.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction40.label: Port
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction40.description: A hub where trade routes intersect. A noisy cauldron of people, goods, and ideas, where one can always find work or trouble.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction41.label: Mine
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction41.description: A harsh community of miners living deep underground or in the shadow of massive quarries. Work here is hard, and people are as tough as the rock itself.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction42.label: Bastion
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction42.description: The last stronghold of order in the wild lands. Surrounded by walls and cannons, they believe only force can save civilization.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction43.label: Platform
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction43.description: An isolated settlement based on a massive technical structure. Their life depends entirely on the serviceability of machines and life-support systems.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction44.label: Contour
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction44.description: A network of small settlements linked by unified logistics and a communication system. Maneuverability and coordination are their main trumps.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction45.label: Resource
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction45.description: A grouping that controls a key source of energy or raw materials. They do not negotiate; they dictate terms to the entire region.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction46.label: Vector
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction46.description: A progressive group aimed at rapid technological development. They are ready to risk everything for the sake of tomorrow.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction47.label: Orbit
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction47.description: A grouping that maintains connection with external worlds or satellite systems. Their eyes look to the sky while their hands dig in the dirt.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction48.label: Shelf
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction48.description: An organization specializing in the development of coastal and aquatic wealth. The sea gives them food, glory, and refuge from earthly wars.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction49.label: Highway
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction49.description: Masters of the roads and transport routes. No caravan passes without their permission, and their checkpoints are the only pockets of law in the wasteland.
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction50.label: Station
LanguageData.MF_IndustrialFaction50.description: A former scientific or technical outpost that has become home to those who know how to fix what others have long forgotten how to even turn on.
